last_cruise.paper_extracted: 2606.25811 - Hierarchical Graph Learning for Calendar Spread Strategies
last_cruise.paper_factors_note: Commodity futures specific — requires commodity futures data for validation
last_cruise.top_performer: TOP3自适应止损 (49.7% ann, Sharpe 2.80, DD 10.1%)
last_cruise.correlation_warning: TOP3 variants 0.94-0.99 correlated — effectively 1 strategy with different stop-loss params

cruise_findings.strategy_redundancy: TOP3 variants (止损3%, 止损8%, 因子合成, 50/50) are 0.94-0.99 correlated — consolidate to single entry with stop-loss parameter
cruise_findings.best_risk_adjusted: TOP3自适应止损: 49.7% ann / 2.80 Sharpe / 10.1% DD — historically best
cruise_findings.paper_insight: Calendar spread strategies from 2606.25811 use ANOVA decomposition for cross-sectional normalization — applicable to multi-asset futures
